Motion For Leave To Substitute Sharon Gaines As Successor In Interest For The Deceased, Craig Thomas As Plaintiff; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Shantel Yaghoobian, Esq (Motions)
Off Calendar Jul-26-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: Plaintiff Thomas Craig's motion for leave to substitute.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff's unopposed motion for leave to substitute is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not reported. (302/RBU)

Off Calendar Mar-08-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by Riane Briones Esq. for defendant(s) Itz Networks,Inc.; Appearance by Thomas Yen Esq. for defendant(s) Healthright 360. The jury trial date is continued to 3-18-23 per agreement of parties and there will be no further continuances due to scheduling conflicts. Judge Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk VWU; Not Reported. (610)
